message.content:
@startuml
participant "AddressPanel : JPanel" as AddressPanel_JPanel
participant ContactsController
note right of AddressPanel_JPanel: double clicks on\nthe contact to open a window
create addressFrame #9283B0;JFrame#FFFFFF;line:black;text:green;font:bold;;16
ContactsController ->>addressFrame #9283B0;JFrame#FFFFFF;line:black;text:green;font:bold;;16:new (contact)
activate addressFrame #9283B0;JFrame#FFFFFF;line:black;text:green;font:bold;;16
return tmp = validatePostalCode(postalCode)\n 
deactivate addressFrame #9283B0;JFrame#FFFFFF;line:black;text:green;font:bold;;16
loop [while there are lines to read]
  participant Persistence
  activate Persistence
end loop
alt {tmp == true}
    updateAddress(contact, main_address,\nsecondary_address) \ngetRepositoryFactory()
else getContactsRepository()\nupdate(contact)
end alt
@enduml
